name: Mustard Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cover potatoes with water and cook until tender but firm.
2. Drain and cool.
3. In a bowl, combine egg salad, mayonnaise, mustard, onion, and salt.
4. Stir in cooled potatoes.
5. Cover and chill.
6. Serve on lettuce leaves; garnish with radishes if desired.
